description_long: This house features a steep, asymmetrical red-tiled roof with patches of green moss, giving it a weathered, medieval appearance. The upper story overhangs a timber-framed lower level, with exposed wooden beams and white plaster infill. A prominent stone chimney runs up one side of the house, adding to its rustic charm. The windows are small, with blue-tinted glass panes set in wooden frames, and the front facade includes a pair of arched windows beneath a gabled dormer. The ground floor has an open arcade with stone columns and arches, suggesting a sheltered entry or porch area. The overall structure is narrow and tall, with intricate woodwork and a whimsical, storybook quality.
description: A tall, narrow medieval-style house with a steep, mossy red-tiled roof, exposed timber framing, and a prominent stone chimney. Blue-paned windows and an arched arcade add to its rustic, storybook charm.
description_view_0: Front view shows the overhanging upper story, arched windows, and the main gabled dormer above a sheltered arcade.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the steep roof, exposed timber framing, and the stone chimney running up the right side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full height of the stone chimney, a small window, and the asymmetrical roofline.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals more timber framing, blue-paned windows, and the overhanging upper story.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with small blue-paned windows and a central dormer
attribute_entryway_design: Arched arcade with stone columns, recessed entry, and decorative timber framing
